name: ceropdf
description: CeroPDF — free, local-first PDF tools that run in the browser. npm workspaces monorepo.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/heavy/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/pdf-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/pdf-render/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit
